goal: Announce any newly-available deck (gift/achievement) via popup, auto-sort My Decks available-first, and fully remove the Re-draw button element
done: Added maybeShowUnseenDeckRewards() in deck-reward.js fired on auth-ready from auth.js onAuthStateChange (dynamic import, guarded vs login-reward popup) — surfaces any unlocked-but-unseen streak/gift deck; gift decks get gift-specific copy (deckRewardGiftEyebrow/Body EN+TH; isGiftedDeck now exported from data.js). Auto-sorted renderDeckInventory available-first (active->unlocked->locked by unlock_day, scales to new decks/achievement unlocks). Removed #newReadingBtn element from reading.html + th/reading.html (was only hidden=true via e499451). Synced canonical->www->ios.
verified: NOT visually QA'd in a browser
notes: Pawbit gift unlock itself was already live (e499451 on origin/main); this adds the announce-popup so the gift surfaces + auto-sort. data.js/common.js are imported without ?v so returning visitors may keep stale modules — purge Cloudflare after deploy. iOS native binary is NOT updated by this web push; it needs a rebuild + TestFlight upload.
